navbar.subtitle: We Recommend, You Decide
landing.feature_1_desc: Our algorithm ranks shops by balancing distance, price, and customer reviews.
landing.feature_2_desc: Real reviews from local customers help you make the best decision.
landing.feature_3_desc: Shopkeepers can easily list their services and attract nearby customers.
landing.step1_desc: Find local shops and services around your current location instantly.
landing.step2_desc: Compare prices, distance, and read genuine reviews from neighbors.
landing.step3_desc: Get directions or contact the shopkeeper directly to get your work done.
landing.about_desc: Servease was born out of a simple idea: to bridge the gap between skilled local professionals and people who need them. We believe in strengthening neighborhood economies by making local services accessible, transparent, and completely hassle-free.
Manage your service listings and busines: Manage your service listings and business profile.
login.subtitle: Sign in to Servease to continue
signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join Servease today
footer.desc: Smart service recommendation platform. Connecting students and locals with the best-rated shops based on price, distance, and reviews.
footer.address: 123 University Road, Tech Park, Pune, MH 411001
landing.hero_subtitle: Servease helps you discover top-rated tailors, xerox shops, mechanics, and laundry services. We analyze price, distance, and ratings to recommend the absolute best option.
landing.join_today_subtitle: Join today to book or review these amazing local shops.
user.find_best_rated: Find the best-rated shops near you
user.no_matches_subtitle: We couldn't find any services matching your specific filters. Try adjusting them.
shop_desc.1: High-speed laser printing, thesis spiral binding, and lamination services. Special discount for bulk college assignments.
shop_desc.2: Expert alteration, custom uniform stitching, and intricate dress materials. 24-hour express delivery available for minor alterations.
shop_desc.3: Expert plumbing repairs, pipe leak fixes, and water heater installation. Quick response time and reliable service across the city.
shop_desc.4: Professional deep cleaning for homes and offices. Sofa dry cleaning, bathroom descaling, and floor polishing.
shop_desc.5: High-resolution color plotting, flex banner printing, A0/A1 size architectural plans printouts, and photo glossy printing.
shop_desc.6: Home appliances repair: AC servicing, Refrigerator repair, and general electrical wiring fixes. Doorstep service.
shop_desc.7: Exclusive bridal lehengas, custom designer blouses, and western wear stitching. Appointment recommended for accurate measurements.
shop_desc.8: Full apartment deep cleaning, pest control, and sanitization services. Eco-friendly cleaning products used.
shop_desc.9: Two-wheeler servicing, synthetic oil change, puncture repair, and deep foam wash. Genuine Castrol oils used.
shop_desc.10: Cheapest bulk black & white xerox in the area. Ideal for engineering notes and textbooks. Golden-embossed hardbound project binding available.
shop_desc.11: Specialized in Royal Enfield and sport bike maintenance. Chain lubrication, disc brake adjustment, and engine tuning.
shop_desc.12: Effective termination of cockroaches, termites, and bed bugs. Complete home cleaning packages. 1-year guarantee.
shop_desc.13: Emergency home repair services. Leak fixing, tap replacements, and installation of water heaters. Available 24/7.
shop_desc.14: Premium 100gsm color printing and spiral binding. ID card lamination and passport photo printing in 5 minutes.
shop_desc.15: Bespoke suits, blazers, and formal trousers. Made-to-measure perfection with premium imported Italian fabrics.
shop_desc.16: Complete car servicing, dent removal, painting, and AC gas refilling. Pick up and drop available.
shop_desc.17: Doorstep salon services for women. Haircuts, waxing, manicures, and bridal makeup packages available.
shop_desc.18: Laptop motherboard repair, screen replacement, RAM upgrades, and data recovery services. No fix, no fee policy.
shop_desc.19: Fixing short circuits, installing fans, lights, and switchboards. Commercial and residential electrical setups.
shop_desc.20: Local room and apartment shifting for students and families. Safe packaging and careful transport of fragile items.
shop_desc.21: Verified and background-checked maids for daily cleaning, cooking, and babysitting. Monthly subscriptions available.
shop_desc.22: Specialized in PhD thesis binding, golden embossing, and leather cover making. Bulk college discounts.
shop_desc.24: Window and Split AC installation, deep chemical washing, and gas refilling. Authorized technicians.
shop_desc.25: School and college uniforms stitched in 48 hours. Precise fitting guaranteed. Alterations done on the spot.
shop_desc.26: Doorstep car washing with foam. Interior vacuuming, dashboard polishing, and tire shining included.
shop_desc.27: Specialized in MacBooks and Gaming Laptops. Thermal paste replacement, SSD upgrades, and hinge repair.
shop_desc.28: High-quality laser color printouts, ID card making, and mug printing. We also print on t-shirts.
shop_desc.29: Affordable wash and fold service. We use hypoallergenic detergents perfect for sensitive skin.
shop_desc.30: Custom furniture building and repair. Sofa upholstery changing, door fixing, and modular kitchen installation.
